title: British Columbia Programme Monthly Trend Sheet - June 2025
content: In June 2025, credit prices in BC LCFS increased by 11.81% month-on-month (MoM), going from $244.76 in May 2025 to $273.67 in June - still well below the March's peak of $345.09. Year-to-date credit volumes for 2025 increased from 2024, by about 1.90%, and are currently at 811,715. June 2025 saw an uptick of 11.36% compared to the same period last year, with volumes rising from 110,292 in June 2024 to 122,825 in June 2025 - although remaining significantly below the March 2025 peak of 456,388. Credit activity in June has remained consistent in the past years, with an exception to June 2022.
author: Aru Somya
